title: The next era of AI coding
summary: Michael Truell presents Cursor's data on the rapid shift from manual coding to AI-powered autonomous agents developing software end-to-end. He shares metrics showing 30% of Cursor's PRs are fully agent-developed and enterprise code went from 15% to 75% AI-generated in one year, positioning engineers as agent managers rather than implementers.
